reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. WOW  Very strong magnet. This a very strong magnet. It has the strongest magnetic power I have ever seen.

Review 2: rating 5.0. Five Stars This magnet is SOOOOO strong... i stuck it to my tool box and almost couldn't remove it.

Review 3: rating 5.0. Five Stars A very strong magnet, fast shipping.

Review 4: rating 5.0. Better than expected Better than expected.  This thing is built solid. Has at least 350 lbs of holding power on some thick steel, and is doing exactly as expected. Great magnet for a great price.

Review 5: rating 5.0. Wisconsin This will pick up anything at the bottom of the lake.  Too many bolts & nuts and wrenches dropped when putting in the dock.

Review 6: rating 5.0. All in  one The whole package here, no going to Lowes trying find the right crap to make it work after you buy the magnet. THIS WORKS!

Review 7: rating 5.0. Strongest magnet you will ever own I bought this because because while boating last year one of our gets lost there keys off the dock. If I would have had this I could have picked up a Volks Wagon. I can not believe how strong this magnet is, it truly is the strongest magnet you will ever own. now while on the river this year I will be trolling for metal object on the bottom.

Review 8: rating 1.0. More like 25 pounds I was totally misled by the reviews that said the pull was 350 pounds.  It is nowhere near that.  More like 25 pounds.

Review 9: rating 5.0. great magnet. very happy on time. great magnet. very happy.

Review 10: rating 5.0. This magnet is awesome!! The only thing to watch out for ... This magnet is awesome!! The only thing to watch out for is the eye bolt coming unscrewed... to excited didn't even think to put on loc-tite

Review 11: rating 5.0. Perfect for magnet fishing I love it! It's heavy enough to sink to the bottom of the river while I do magnet fishing. I've only had time to go out once but retrieved a couple old 3 prong hooks, pliers and motorcycle handlebars. Can't wait til it warms up again to go! The price very reasonable

Review 12: rating 4.0. Tiny but strong... Seems small to me but it is what it is...lol

Review 13: rating 5.0. strong magnet Satisfied with this magnet. Very strong magnet works great for magnet fishing

Review 14: rating 5.0. A beast This thing is a beast!  I got it with an assortment of smaller neodymium magnets to build a maglev science project with my 3rd grader, and the pull is just incredible.  Make sure you keep your fingers clear or you'll get quite the snap.  The hole in the center allowed me to attach it to a wooden platform with a simple bolt setup, or if you want to use it for magnet fishing the attached eyebolt will work perfectly.  Have fun

Review 15: rating 5.0. great magnet very strong magnet, now it's time to go magnet fishing

Review 16: rating 5.0. Now I just need to find better place to fish Has no problem with the catch of hot rocks and holds them well. Now I just need to find better place to fish.

Review 17: rating 4.0. nice magnet Nice size. At first I thought it was not all that strong. WRONG, it is great and what I ask for and just what I needed. Packaged well and arrived when expected.

Review 18: rating 5.0. Great Magnet! excellent magnet! exactly what was advertised.

Review 19: rating 5.0. Strong *%& Magnet Yes! This is a small and mighty strong magnet. Handle with care seriously it will stick to metal things from 5" away. Great for magnet fishing.

Review 20: rating 5.0. Good for magnet fishing. Just what I had hoped for.  Good powerfull magnet.
persona: This customer prioritizes high performance and superior quality when making purchases, willing to invest in products that deliver strong, reliable results without compromising on durability or power.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Power lifter! Very powerful and high qualty!

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Works!! Love it, works the same as a Lowes or home depot brand. It's inexpensive​ not cheap and does the job at 1/2 the price. Review 2: rating 5.0. ... with about the same temperatures each time so it's pretty accurate. I know it cleared my curiosity with ... I used this in conjunction with a seek thermal and they both came up with about the same temperatures each time so it's pretty accurate. I know it cleared my curiosity with heat dispersion between a incandescent and curly bulb, the incandescent is nearly 100 to 130 degrees hotter if you're curious. Review 3: rating 5.0. Great IR Thermometer This IR thermometer is fantastic. It's more of a toy than a tool for me, as I rarely have a use for it other than for my own personal enjoyment. I have a dog named Max. If you are curious to know what the temperature of Max's anus is, don't worry. With this tool I found it to be 99.6 degrees Fahrenheit. If you do not use Imperial units, with the press of a single button this tool can change units, which I tested and found that Max's anus was 36.6 degrees Celsius. Review 4: rating 5.0. Interesting tool. Good quality, quick measuring. I use it for mainly checking temperature of dummy load for USB power supply and also solar panel out put check when I test those things.
but not only for those, it is interesting to check temperature of anything.
Forex, my 85W flood light is over 60 degC but my LED flood light equivalent to 85W is only about 40 degC.
It is cheap but quite good quality. just check temperature on anything to check if that's safe for touc... Review 5: rating 3.0. the device is good, but the laser pointer is useless because it ... Just received this item about twenty minutes ago. Seems to do what it advertises; it takes the temperature accurately, as far as I can tell. The only problem I have is that the laser pointer is not centered. When I point the gun at a surface, the laser tends to be shining above and to the left of the actual gun. I double checked that the actual temperature sensor was not skewed to the left and verified that when I pl... Review 6: rating 5.0. Great little device Great little device. Very flexible, from food to household. Compared measurements to some other devices and accuracy seems very good. Helped flag areas missing insulation in the home. Review 7: rating 5.0. Wonderful multiple use tool. Limited only by your imagination. The perfect item to use for a variety of temperature needs. I have used this to determine the temperature of food on the grill, in the oven, on the stove and even checked the freezer temperature. In addition I use it to check to temperature of the pool. I also used it to check around the doors and windows in the house and discovered where I needed some extra insulation.

There are so many uses for this item that... Review 8: rating 4.0. Accurate Worked as expected and has been accurate. Included was a nice soft case with a closed belt loop. The plastic body has a non slippery feel. The size was perfect for me, not bulky at all. Review 9: rating 3.0. OK for basic home use, get something better if you're a pro OK, not great. But the nice ones cost a TON of money. The unit isn't very consistent, but I think it's still a useful tool for most people. Someone who needs more accuracy needs to spend more money. Review 10: rating 5.0. Great for taking the temp of wood burning stove, battery lasts forever I bought this to use on my wood burning stove so I could be sure it was burning at a good temp (between 400F and 600F). I just realized I've had it for almost two years and I've never had to change the battery. It works better if you position it a foot or two from what you're trying to read the temp of, rather than farther away. Think of it like a cone in front of the gun, the farther you are from the surface you'... Review 11: rating 5.0. And then call Animal Regulations to take care of this poor animal left in a car to die We have two of these. We carry one in the car and when we see someone has left there dog in the car we can check the temp. And then call Animal Regulations to take care of this poor animal left in a car to die. Review 12: rating 1.0. Not very accurate Used to check temp of our oven. Didn't work very well Review 13: rating 5.0. Useful for lots of stuff! small, compact, and very accurate - everything you want in a digital thermometer.

When I first bought this, I saw it on a deal page for $7.99 but wondered what I would do with one of these things. I bought one and here's what I've used it for so far:

I used it as a forehead thermometer to check my son's head when he had a fever
I checked the temperature of boiling water when I boiled eggs to get the perfect soft boiled eggs!
I... Review 14: rating 5.0. Funny way to use it but, HEY, it works great! Works as expected.
It's original purpose is to measure temperature on computers and air conditioner appliances, and food, why not?

Incredibly it's first debut was on a kid with fever. Here is the funny story!
On a family meeting we found that a nephew wasn't playing with the other kids, so my wife sensed she was warm and she attempted to find the oral thermometer to no avail.
Here is where my gadgets come to play... Review 15: rating 5.0. Fine product Very nicely designed, feels good in the hand, easy to read. As usual I didn't read instructions about where to hold it to get accurate reading. I used it at first from too far away from object. About six inches is good and accurate. Checked my roof painting project here in Florida. Black roof asphalt shingle in afternoon, 189, after coating with white gloss acrylic latex paint, 114. Good for grill too. Review 16: rating 5.0. I bought this to calibrate my PC temperature sensors. ... I bought this to calibrate my PC temperature sensors. I used it for a total of five minutes for that, and about 7 hours taking the temperature of everything else I own. Review 17: rating 5.0. get one! Loving it!!, We got this because we having hard time to check room temp, my daughter temp many many times! with this, OMG make things so easy!!! I highly recommended, make sure you get one yourself!! A++++ Review 18: rating 4.0. Useful tool to have Useful tool to have. Was having AC problems and wanted to see what temperature the air was blowing out at. It does a decent job, but don't expect precise results. It's easy enough to use, and nothing complicated with the layout of the buttons and their functions. I like that it came with a battery, instead of having to go out to the store and buy one. Be sure to read the side of the thermometer as it displays the surface size it measures. So if you are furth... Review 19: rating 5.0. Good purchase. Work. Doesn't feel cheap. Good purchase. Review 20: rating 5.0. Five Stars Backlight feature is a nice touch. Does what it needs to do. I'm happy.
persona: This customer values affordability, everyday functionality, and versatility in a product, and is drawn to items that offer practical benefits across multiple uses while being easy and enjoyable to use.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Perfect Tool for a Perfect Price! Perfect little tool at a perfect price! I love my new Laser Thermometer! I use it almost everyday when i cook to double check the temperatures on my so-so stove. In less than a second, i can tell exactly the temp of the pan, or the surface temperature of the food! It's also useful in the winter to look for temperature leaks around the doors and windows. It also a ton of fun to use when goofing off. being able to check a temp from accross the room almost feels like a super-human power! get this lasergun! 10/10

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Worth the price if you can wait Took 3 weeks to get in but work just fine for the price. Review 2: rating 4.0. Good Value Good value for the price. Charges a little slower than the original equipment. Review 3: rating 1.0. Weak magnets make for a poor charging experience The magnets were too weak to align properly so charging was difficult to get started and maintain. The slightest movement would unalign the charging pins and I had to carefully align everything again. At first I thought, maybe one of the cables was just defective, but both of them acted this way. Review 4: rating 1.0. Did not work Bought this charger for my fossil watch. Item was delivered as promised. The charger did not charge my watch... tried every way possible for it to charge. There are definitely lots of differences from the original charger to the replacement I received. Review 5: rating 1.0. Awful First one lasted about 10 days, second one charges whenever it feels like. The magnets are weak too. Review 6: rating 5.0. Good quality product I just found this, I needed another charge for trips and this one fits that need exactly. Solid product. good quality. overall I'm happy with this. Review 7: rating 1.0. Pass It charges, but the magnets aren't very strong. Not strong enough to keep connected.

** UPDATE, one of the two will not stay connected long enough to charge. Will not charge my Fossil Carlyle Gen 5. Review 8: rating 2.0. Doesn't always make a good connection While this two pack is great to have... it doesn't have a very strong magnetic so it doesn't always make the connection so it sometimes won't be charged when I expect it to be charged. I have to sometimes set things on top of it to ensure its charged. So while it doesn't work well it works better than nothing. Review 9: rating 5.0. Does what its supposed to good price, good product, delivered very fast to HK Review 10: rating 3.0. Charges a few seconds at a time I bought this product to charge my Gen 5 Carlyle. Sometimes it charges straight through the night, and sometimes it will charge for a few seconds at a time. I'm not sure if the magnet is to blame or something else. I don't feel like it is as reliable as the OEM charger, so it pretty much defeats the purpose of having more than one. Even at the cheaper price for two, I would rather have one rock solid charger that remains charging all the time. Review 11: rating 1.0. Does not work Does not work and not magnetic. The watch slips off the base. Review 12: rating 5.0. Great Great for when you need an extra charging cord for your fossil watch but don’t want to spend the money Review 13: rating 5.0. Nice to have a spare at the office. I had to order these after I left my one charger that came with the watch at home while I was on travel. They work great and they're reasonably priced. Review 14: rating 1.0. This product is cheap and doesn't work Product doesn't work. Magnet does not hold watch in place and doesn't charge the watch. Will not buy this again. Review 15: rating 1.0. Inconsistent/no charging Charger does not work. Have to hold in sweet spot on gen5 fossil to get like 1 second of charging. Extremely inconsistent and unusable. Returning immediately Review 16: rating 1.0. Weak magnets make charging difficult This would have been a great value since you get two chargers at a low price, however they do not compare to the standard charger that comes with the watch at all. The magnets are weak and disengages at the slightest touch, and half of the time I find my watch not charged. It is extra hard to get it to stay in place to charge when I swapped out the stock band for one with a magnetic closure. I ended up returning this item. Review 17: rating 1.0. Had hopes for the cheap chargers, but they were as expected. I thought I'd give these cheap two-pack chargers a shot to use for my Fossil Gen 5 watch while traveling. They were horrible. To begin, they feel super cheap. I attached the charger to the watch and the magnet was so weak it wouldn't stay clamped. Then, I placed it in a way that it wouldn't move, and the watch would just keep turning on and off. It seems as if the wiring they used cannot handle the current draw needed to ch... Review 18: rating 2.0. listen to what everyone is saying yep. i wish i would have listened to what all the reviews said. charges a little, then stops, then charges a little and stops. over and over again. does not make good contact. Review 19: rating 1.0. Wouldn't charge. These would not charge my watch. Neither of the cords worked. Review 20: rating 2.0. Not very happy with these! They do charge my Fossil Gen 5 but you have to be extremely careful placing them on the watch. Even just setting it down on the counter can disconnect the pins and it will not charge.

I do not recommend these chargers.

This is a pack of two.
persona: This customer prioritizes functional reliability and practical performance in their purchases, especially valuing consistent connectivity and dependable operation, while also appreciating products that meet specific usability needs like appropriate brightness for professional environments.
reference_output: rating 2.0. Poor connection won't charge You really have to mess with these to get them to start charging.  The magnet is weak on them and the spring on the connections don't seem strong enough to make good contact with the charging rings.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. Do not buy I got two or three RPM readings and then nothing. The battery was still fine because the memory button still worked but it simple would not make RPM readings even when point the device that the target that originally produce results. Do not buy. Review 2: rating 4.0. laser tach only used this once seems to do a good job.was a little eratic as rpm kept going up and down but it may have been the unit i was testing. excelent price. give it a try Review 3: rating 1.0. Do they test these things? Apparently, I got a defective unit. The numbers are all over, appearing to be random and are frequently zero. The added insult is that I'm currently in Thailand (amazon.com won't ship this to Thailand) and I had to arrange for a visiting friend to bring it. Returning it would cost several times what I paid for the unit. Review 4: rating 3.0. Finicky, but it works It's very sensitive to distance and lighting, but if you hold it within an inch or so of the tape, it will pick it up. Make sure the surface the tape is mounted on is clean and uniform in color, or the tach will get confused. Review 5: rating 2.0. did not work in all fairness, the box it came in was slightly damaged on one corner, but it didn't have any visible damage inside.
tried to use it and readings, when I got any were all over the place. Review 6: rating 1.0. Cheap construction, short lived, non functional in daylight. Ordered two of these. First one worked fine for a while, but ate batteries like they were going out of style. 2nd unit never worked. Messaged CyberTech and never got a response. Review 7: rating 1.0. One Star Failed after 3 o 4 uses. Review 8: rating 1.0. Junk Accuracy off by over 50%. Total piece of garbage! Review 9: rating 5.0. Very good value Seems to be accurate. Did the flouresent light test ( should read 7200), spot on. Tested against my vehicle's tach at idle accurate & steady. For way less than $20, it's a handy tool to have around. It came with ~18" of reflective tape, but you can also use aluminum foil and scotch tape if need be. Best results are when the pulley or whatever is non reflective, with just one point being reflective. Review 10: rating 4.0. For the price, it's really tough to complain. I don't have anything else to measure RPM with to compare for accuracy, but the tachometer arrived promptly and in good shape. Instructions are adequate (basically affix reflective tape to rotating object, then point tach laser at reflective tape while rotating). Reflective tape supplied is generous (especially since you can apply to any, less permanent tape or surface and reuse one scrap a hundred times). For really accurate measureme... Review 11: rating 1.0. Ruined in less than 1 week of use The batteries the unit was supplied with did not work. But this was no problem. We bought new ones. It worked on three tests. The fourth try, it only marked 0 RPM. This unit has not lasted 1 week. I do not suggest anyone buy this. Review 12: rating 5.0. Does what its supposed to I purchased this optical unit in order to verify my pulse tach readings on my boat motor. It did what it was supposed to, and verified that I was receiving accurate readings on my pulse tach. The unit is simple to use; point and press the button. I've not had the need to use it for anything else, but it has become part of my motor troubleshooting kit. an excellent product for the price. Review 13: rating 4.0. Neat little tool. This handheld laser tach works great. I used it on an outboard motor that could not support a standard tach. The only issue I had was that it did not work outdoors in direct sunlight. As the sun dropped down, then it was able to "see" the reflector and read the rpm's. Indoors it works perfectly. Aside from the sunlight issue this is a neat little tool. Review 14: rating 5.0. Great Value for Price, Numerous Uses I needed something to set the engine speed on lawnmowers, garden tractors, etc. Briggs & Stratton sells a little wheel with a wire that vibrates at a certain speed, but it's not usable unless you have a flat surface to lay it on, and it's hard to see the numbers--plus it costs 50% more than this little jewel.

This tach only require putting a reflective "spot" on the shaft or pulley you want to measure the speed on. Some reflec... Review 15: rating 1.0. Here's the video, you tell me if it's garbage (hint: yes, it is) [[VIDEOID:e31ab9cc7f299bd64960d080050d6cd4]] I wish I could say that I got my money's worth on an inexpensive tachometer. The description said "In wood and metal working it can be used to accurately measure the speed of a lathe or milling machine.", so I put the tape on the spindle of my lathe and took a video of the result.

As you can see, the meter never reads anything except zero RPM. I got some false ho... Review 16: rating 3.0. Inconsistent Reading Based on others reviews, I did not expect flawless operation. I first tried the tool in conjunction with an Innova 3160 code reader to observe live data rpm and it worked, read within 50 rpm which was good enough. While setting idle on a 75 hp jeep F134 engine, the machine read 4500 rpm at idle.... just no way thats close. Tried this reading from several different angles but it read impossibly high. Easy to read display and the laser is bright.
Reads bett... Review 17: rating 1.0. One Star worked for one day then quit working Review 18: rating 2.0. Cheap, hard to use Affordable, but this thing sure is finicky! I realize this is a bargain basement price for a great tool, but this thing barely works! Or rather, it works under such a slight set of circumstances that it was useless to me. I'm not sure if it's just a cheap model, or if it only works under perfect conditions, but I had 4 or 5 jobs I needed to do with this one, and it barely handled one of them.

Maybe I needed a strobe tach or something high end, but this d... Review 19: rating 5.0. Awesome The Digital Photo Laser Tachometer performed great. I was very pleased and it tested to be very accurate. On an 18000 rpm spindle, the readout was 17997 rpm in just one second. Review 20: rating 4.0. Inexpensive, easy to use, spotty consistency If you're looking for a good averaged non-contact tach this will work.
if you're looking for a finely tuned, highly accurate tach keep looking.
Used if one half a dozen projects already and find it helpful but has issues being consistent in readings.
From reading to reading it will vary by 30-50%. Some may due to operator error (me) but not all.
Still, for the price, it does what I need it to do.

Updating as ...
persona: This customer prioritizes functional precision and practical utility in tools, specifically seeking devices that accurately support technical operations like Lathe RPM and CNC mill spindle RPM, and is willing to accept minor usability challenges if the product delivers reliable performance for its intended purpose.
reference_output: rating 3.0. perfect for Lathe RPM and CNC mill spindle RPM A bit hard to get it angled just right, but does the job with a small margin of error.  perfect for Lathe RPM and CNC mill spindle RPM.  Helps get the speeds and feeds just right.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. The Best Canister I have ever bought! I have always bought canister vacuums for my bare floors and after buying at least 10 over the past 15 years this is the best I have
every bought! I love the Suction on this, you have a dial on the base to either get strong suction for the floors or lighter suction for vacuuming curtains and for me a rug hung on my wall. There is also another way to adjust the suction from the handle if you prefer. The bags are much bigger then any canister ... Review 2: rating 5.0. Five Stars Great machine. Great price. If you need a canister, get it. You won't be disappointed. Review 3: rating 5.0. Great inexpensive vacuum Very pleased with this little vacuum - well made, effective unit. As others have noted, it's only flaws are a shortish cord and rather short tube, making vacuuming position a little uncomfortable for taller folks. Not that great on pile rugs, but is perfect for bare floors and low pile carpet.

Love that it is easy to maneuver, has reel-in cord and good sized bag for such a small unit. Highly recommended at $50 price point. Review 4: rating 5.0. Bissell Canister Vac My first canister vacuum - and I am a convert from the old upright. Seriously, it's only $50, so buy it and try it. If you hate it, return to Amazon at no cost to you. I typically research things to death before buying something, especially anything online, but I bought this pretty quickly after reading several positive reviews and the Q&As. I am about 5'5" and the length of the vacuum stick thing is just right for me - so this may be really uncomfortable if ... Review 5: rating 5.0. Bissell Zing. canister vacuum Love this vacuum so far. Used it a couple of times. Great suction. O.k. on carpets. I have a dark green carpet that shows every piece of white fuzz possible. As I am a cleaning fanatic, it will probably fine for anyone else. Review 6: rating 5.0. Best little sweeper I ever had. Wonderful for hardwood and vinyl floors and for getting under beds, couches etc. Does great on stairs; light weight and very powerful suction. I plan to purchase another for my daughter. Review 7: rating 4.0. Light, small, powerful enough The canister vacuum was as described: light, small, powerful enough for our uses, in a rather small apartment with plenty of stairs. The automatic re-wind cord is a good feature, and the cord is much longer than that of our old vac. The attachments, as others have noted, are almost useless, they are so small and poorly designed. We will have to find a brush that fits the tube. The low price was most attractive. Review 8: rating 5.0. Terrific Vacuum Cleaner I wanted a canister vacuum and this one is perfect. It is exactly what I wanted and hoped it would be. The color is great too. The suction is very good. I have two cats and we have lots of cat hair around and it picks it all up. I wanted it so I could get behind furniture and in hard to reach places and it is great for that. I do use a duster attachment from my other vacuum on the Bissell Zing. I like the name Zing, too. Review 9: rating 5.0. great! only lacks one thing Returned the Oreck $400+ for this vacuum and I'm not sorry! Have a bad back and needed a super-light-weight vacuum for daily dog hair p/u. This one goes under ALL of my furniture; it swivels; it's light and maneuverable; great suction and stores well. I am 5ft tall and this is the perfect height for me! The only thing I would change would be a beater brush for rugs. I hope it continues to function just as well. Review 10: rating 5.0. Perfect Vacuum It is super-awesome! I have had for 1 year now. It is so light and maneuverable. Its vacuuming power is great. If possible, I would have given it 10 stars :) Review 11: rating 5.0. Great for My Needs After reading many reviews, I went with this canister. I wanted something really light and maneuverable for the carpet on the curving stair case that is the first thing that greets you when you enter the house. My carpet is really a light color (almost white) and very plush. This vacuum has been perfect for what I wanted. Really strong suction. I use the small attachment, which I wish was a little larger, but it works really well and gets into all the corners ... Review 12: rating 2.0. Replacement Bags????? This is an awesome vacuum. Very strong, lightweight, I love it...when I have enough bags to use. Amazon does NOT sell the correct replacement bags and I feel like I wasted my money. The only place I was able to find bags was on the Bissell website. I tried to order more the other night and they were OUT OF STOCK. I called Bissell's 800 number and they confirmed that the only place to get the bags was on their website and they were out of stock. So I guess I'll... Review 13: rating 5.0. Best bang for your buck. Great suction, fair price. I love this vacuum cleaner. I have used it twice now and my husband has used it once. His comment right after using it was, "Wow! that thing's got some suction!". It really sucks up way more than my old canister(s). I have no complaints about the hose seeming to be cheap as some others have mentioned in their reviews. The bags are also a typical size for a canister vacuum (some had complained they seemed small). I wi... Review 14: rating 1.0. Do Not Buy This is the worse vacuum cleaner I have ever purchased. While it is small and light weighted, it is extremely uncomfortable to use, the suction is ok, but the quality of the parts is so bad that you can't get any dirt off of a regular carpet....it flips non stop, so extremely unstable.
Please do not buy this product and I think that Amazon should reconsider who they are dealing w. Quality of a product one of the big reasons I shop on Amazon. Review 15: rating 4.0. Zing works well Bought this little vacuum for our weekend cabin. It does a good job on the laminate and tile floors and is effective picking up dog hair. Would recommend it. Review 16: rating 5.0. Five Stars The best vacuum for hardwood floors Review 17: rating 2.0. Two Stars does not vacuum very well. Review 18: rating 5.0. Best vacuum for dog hair I've bought many vacuums over many years, and this is the first one that doesn't spit out the hair behind it! The suction is great, it's lightweight and easy to maneuver. I like having a bagged machine, it's cleaner than the bagless ones, which never get really clean.
I'd recommend this to anyone whose dog sheds! Review 19: rating 5.0. One heck of a great Vacuum This is a little champ. If you live in a smaller apartment, then this is the right machine for you. Hard floors to low pile carpet , this little vacuum is a champ. If you do not mind a bagged machine then please give this a chance. If your a Dyson snob then it might come up a bit shy, but not a complete runaway. I borrowed my mom's Dyson Pet and gave them a side by side. This little bugger removed more pet hair than the Dyson. Bissell has been at thi... Review 20: rating 2.0. Zing Ding I bought this zing vacuum for my new little all vinyl floor house, with just a few very low pile area rugs...and a long hair cat. It does the job on bare floor, has good suction with attachment/hose, and is lightweight and compact, handy. However it does an abysmal job on the area rugs...specifically the cat hair. What little it does try to pick up gets snagged on the fuzzy brushy strip on the floor head. No real brushes, and no beater bar, so it just plain doesn't work fo...
persona: This customer values strong performance and build quality in a vacuum but is frustrated by the high cost and incompatibility of recommended replacement bags, indicating a preference for products with readily available, affordable, and correctly fitting consumables.
reference_output: rating 3.0. Good, but expensive bags. OK, this is just a quick note on this vacuum. It is good, it sucks hard and seems well built and very affordable. However, the correct bags for this vacuum are difficult to find and expensive. The bags that Amazon suggests you buy with the Bissell Zing 4122 are bags that say 7100 and 7100L series. These bags are not like the ones that come with the unit, they are significantly smaller and the cardboard that attaches is wider and very difficult to fit. They do work though, just not correctly. The correct bags are, I believe: Bissell Dust Bag 3pk 4122 Series #2138425 (if you search Amazon) At the time of writing this they cost 14.70 for 3 bags.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Cool fun drawing Love all the colors. I love to create things with my hands. With the 3D pens I have a lot of fun. Review 2: rating 1.0. persona: This customer prioritizes color consistency and accuracy for creative projects, is discouraged by variability in product batches, and seeks reliable, predictable results when purchasing multiple units for coordinated use.
reference_output: rating 2.0. Don't buy multiples hoping the colors will match..... I bought 2 packages of these trying to make a rainbow stacker toy for my kids without having to buy full spools of every color of the rainbow. Each color in this bundle is about 17-18g and I needed double that for some of the colors. When I received them, some of the colors weren't the same shade between the 2 bundles, so they definitely aren't consistent with colors. The 2 lime greens were completely different, there was no way I could combine them to make one piece without seeing a huge color difference. The quality of the filament is fine, works great in my Ender 5 Plus with no issues, but if you're hoping to buy more than one and color match, I wouldn't count on it, unfortunately.

Review 1: rating 3.0. Not blown away I used this to clean my driveway and really didn't feel like I was getting a lot of effect. I used my pressure washer with and without soap on areas. Works fairly well, some caveats The solution works fairly well with only some caveats. I had trouble getting up the brown stain that comes from freshly dropped Acrons. I feel like it was a good product, and I'll most likely purchase again. Review 3: rating 1.0. Would not recommend or buy again! Not great results. Doesn’t do what it claims. reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Good PLA. This is fairly high quality PLA for the price. It is worth noting that, despite what it says, I've had the best luck printing at 230 degrees. Review 2: rating 5.0. Print at 230° Printing at 230° worked for me. I usually use Hatchbox filament at 210° but it was underextruding with this filament/ not sticking to the bed. Per an earlier review, I upped the temperature to 230° and I'm now good to go. 🥳 Review 3: rating 3.0. Hard to recommend for the price Amazon basics PLA is a decent filament but is hard to recommend. This needs lots of fine tuning that isn't needed in higher quality PLA it has some difficulty with adhesion and is somewhat stringy but most of these problems can be solved with hotter extrusion temps. I had good prints at 215 on my extuder and 65 on the bed. All in all a decent filliment but for the price you can get something alot better. Review 4: rating 2.0. Really finicky filament Super difficult for me to dial in the best settings to use for the white PLA. Spent hours. And even when I was confident I had the best settings I was going to get, it's just not a good filament. I figured for the price Amazon was charging they must have a decent PLA. Didn't like it. Reminds me of latex. It wants to stretch with the nozzle as it moves away and I don't mean in the normal way you'd expect stringing to behave. It's more of an elastic stretch of w... Review 5: rating 3.0. Not packaged properly The items did not come vacuum packed (which can allow moisture into the filament which can cause errors in the print), and the filament was not threaded through the hole so there is the potential it is twisted on the spool. I will update the review after using the filament and let you know if there were any issues. Review 6: rating 2.0. Needs some work. Prints have stringing, filament is brittle and hygroscopic, prints appear inconsistent with obvious layer lines. I think having slight opacity is a good way to mask layer lines, they may actually be using too much dye. The other thing that might be causing the pronounced layer lines would be varying diameter or volume along the line of filament which might be allayed with finer tolerances. I appreciate the value and the ability to buy bulk quantities, but the result ... Review 7: rating 1.0. Tangles as it unwinds off spool, doesn't stick well either. I have printed hundred of items and have multiple 3d printers. On my MK3S it kept peeling up as I printed, had to run higher bed temp like 67 on 1st layer to get it to stop. Using hairspray is darn near a must with this filament. Also, It would keep getting tangled as it unwound off the printer spool, 1st time I have ever had that happen and it did it on all 3 spools I bought. Get another brand and save yourself headaches.. Review 8: rating 3.0. Most average filament I've tried Bought this in bulk due to dwindling supplies of filament during all the Covid supply chain issues. This is certainly the cheapest filament I've tried on a cost basis. Though it's very finicky. For the longest time, dozens of Benchy's and cal_cubes, I couldn't find something that worked. Once dialed in it is decent, but not great. Def a you get what you pay for territory. Review 9: rating 2.0. Might wanna pass this one Rarely do I ever have enough problems with filaments that I have to write a review about it but gonna have to do it for this one. Considering as of right now May 2020 there is a worldwide shortage of filaments, I had to resort to getting this one. But it’s just not worth the headache. I’ve used many types of filaments with varying results but this one takes the cake on giving me the most problems. So we here we go :

1. Typical poor packaging that ... Review 10: rating 5.0. some good some bad + UPDATE First roll was amazing I made many prints I was proud of. They looked professional. Second roll I can't make a single print to the end. I have even reloaded file I previously printed and they are horrible. the material strings and is brittle. I measured the diameter and it is all over the place. I can't speak for the first roll because it was great so I didn't measure. During the first roll I was so impressed I ordered a spool of black. I measured... Review 11: rating 2.0. Not for my creality's This filament keeps clogging, no matter what I do. I dryed it for 6 hours, I increased nozzle Temps... You name it. I don't recommend. Review 12: rating 2.0. Poor Quality 2/3 rolls were spooled so when printing it would snag. Never made it to the 3rd roll before returning. Filament prints poorly too. It is elastic and doesn't flow through the nozzle well. Overall not worth committing to 3 kg of. Review 13: rating 2.0. Tangles What you save in the price you pay for in tangles. 6 of my last prints have failed the moment I leave the room due to tangles in the spool. Will not buy again. Recommend Hatchbox. Review 14: rating 3.0. Good Price, poor spool winding, leading to binding and print failures. I have purchased this product 3 or 4 times now, so we are talking 9 to 12 spools over the year.

While it is a good deal for 3 spools of filament I found that the spools weren't wound very uniform and tend to bind up often causing print failures. This filament tends to need to be babysat.

So while it is cheap, quality control could be better! I have wasted probably 2 spools worth of this filam... Review 15: rating 1.0. Not the best out there Tried several filaments and this is the worst to work with. Review 16: rating 1.0. Nozzle Clogs are to Many This filament has caused several lost prints. Printer is calibrated perfectly, with the extruder and the stepper motors. Everything is fine, then start using this filament and nozzle clogs a many. Nozzle temp set normally at 200C, even tried 210C to make it work. Did not help. Ordered 2 3 pk boxes about 18 days apart and am unable to return the 1st order.

Stay with trusted brand names. Review 17: rating 2.0. Twisted spools use caution Be careful with these roles. 2 of the 3 in this bundle were twisted up mid roles and caused me some printer damage. For a few dollar savings buying Amazon brand it ended up more in the long run having to buy replacement guides and stuff. Never had this happen with other brands. I’d recommend if you plan to leave these run without close supervision respool them or unspool to inspect them. Review 18: rating 2.0. Filament is ok. Winding is not I have been printing on several different printers and the filament windings on some of them are bad and get stuck, ruining so many prints. Good filament, just need to wind them better. Review 19: rating 1.0. White pla has Terrible layer adhesion and first layer wont be buying again unless the other 2 rolls i get wind up better Review 20: rating 2.0. Too expensive The filament performs well but just too expensive, I'm glad they kept raising the price because it made me look elsewhere and find it half the price.
persona: This customer values sustainability and practicality in 3D printing supplies, prioritizing refillable components and comprehensive starter kits that reduce waste and streamline the setup process, while being willing to invest in quality products that support long-term efficiency despite occasional issues with specific materials.
reference_output: rating 2.0. Rough print quality I've been a 3D printer for over two years and and have tried numerous types of filament.  I made the mistake of bying a triple pack without testing the product first.  Sadly, the print quality isn't the best.  The filament is very dark.  If you print lithophanes, like me, this is not the product you want.  Due to the dark color, only a small amount of light passes through the filament.  Additionally, the overal print quality was substandard.  I will eventually use this role, probably on test prints, but this experince has given me enough information to never buy it again.  If your prints don't require light, this will work omay, but know it's really not the best, or even cheapest for that matter, on the market.

Had I used this somewhere off road before testing this piece of scrap metal, I would of been in a really bad situation. Buy another jack.

Don't jack something up and expect it to be up the next day. Review 15: rating 1.0. Jack did not operate as it should have. My brother was helping and once I got the piston high enough for him to remove the tire, I stopped pumping on the handle. The piston started to retract immediately. The only way to get the tire off was to continue jacking so the piston would stay up long enough for him to get the tire off. We left the jack in place while we repaired the tire. When we came b... reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. small enough to scoop a little out of a capsule I have some pills that are the lowest dosage available, but I needed an even lower dosage. These scoops are so tiny I can remove the top half of the capsule, scoop out some of the contents, and replace the top. Review 2: rating 5.0. scoops Just needed something to measure bulk supplements out to cap. These fit the bill perfectly. I would order again for that purpose. Review 3: rating 4.0. Tiny scoops! I'm sure that in the scientific world these are awesome scoops that are high on the "must-have" list. If however, you are like me and have no concept of how incredibly miniscule 8-12 mg really is and were merely looking to replace the small scoop that came in your powdered stevia bottle, then this is not the scoop you are looking for! On another note, these make terrific coffee stirrers and fun toys for plastic-addicted maniac cats. I'm also thinking that they c... Review 4: rating 5.0. Great to use for reloading These scoops are great for the purpose of weighing out smokeless powder for reloading. The small scoop size allows for easy handling of tiny amounts of smokeless powder. Review 5: rating 4.0. 2 sizes or a range? prompt service. nice little scoops for making my lotions and potions with. its hard to tell if they have 2 sizes in the container, since 2 sizes are given in the description. maybe since the size is so small they cant be any more precise than the range of 8-12 mg? this isnt lab equipment, after all, but it is a bit confusing. and if you were measuring supplements to ingest, it might make a difference, so you might want to err on the low side in your measurements. Review 6: rating 1.0. What a bunch of garbage. Opened up the package, took out the case and the bottoms falls out and all the scoops fall right on the ground. If you can't even package your item right, you get one star. What a bunch of garbage. Review 7: rating 1.0. 3 mg per spoon No where does it say the volume of the spoon which is insanely annoying if you want to figure out the actual weight of what you are measuring. So after scoop after scoop I painfully determined it to be about 2/1000th of a tsp. And the weight of my particular substance was 3 mg. Ridiculously inaccurate and worthless. A spoon has a volume not a weight. 8-12 mg is only for liquid. For anything else you will be way off.

3 mg is too little for my purposes -... Review 8: rating 5.0. very pleased with this item These scoops are very small, for 8 - 12 mg. size deposits of samples. The anti static properties are especially helpful in dry environments where static poses a problem. The container has a small hole in the lid for individual scoop dispensing and the scoops can be reused for dispensing the same type of sample. Overall, very pleased with this item. Review 9: rating 3.0. Three Stars Love the product just hated the shipping conditon Review 10: rating 3.0. Not very useful for most supplements. Too small to be of much use unless you are measuring pure B vitamins or something like that, in which case you really need a milligram scale anyway. They work ok as stirring sticks for mixing epoxy glue though. Review 11: rating 5.0. Perfect for measuring out consistent amounts of medications for a ... Perfect for measuring out consistent amounts of medications for a family member- accurate when leveled properly, confirmed with microgram scale. will order again Review 12: rating 3.0. Its okay Nothing special here, neither good nor bad Review 13: rating 5.0. Super mini scoop! Really great product, arrived quickly. Perfect miniature spoons - and exactly what I needed. I have to divide larger capsules for my aging dog) into smaller doses and these really help my accuracy. The scoop is big enough to hold about 10+ mg of powdered material. Now, what to do with all the extras, lol! Review 14: rating 5.0. Great measuring scoops for fine powders Product exactly as described - wee little scoops to transfer a fairly consistent amount of solid powder. How much depends on the density of the powder and how precise it is depends on how reproducible the user is as well as how homogeneous the powder is. (For solids with large crystals the precision is not so great - with finely ground material it works great.) This is my second time ordering these and I find them very useful. Review 15: rating 3.0. Works with some powders, not at all with others... These are not truly anti-static it would seem. I have several chemical compounds with which I use them. Some of the powders do not stick much at all, but others adhere so strongly that the entire scoop of powder stays in the spoon. It seems very dependent upon the powder. My only complaint is the claim that it is anti-static and that chemicals will not adhere. That is clearly not true.

Not a complaint, but the scoop is inc... Review 16: rating 5.0. Very worthwhile Very worthwhile from a cost standpoint and, since I used them to fill capsules for vitamin supplements, they are, also, highly reusable. 100 for about $10 compared to others selling only 2 or 3 for $4 or $5--choosing this brand was a no brainer. Review 17: rating 1.0. i made a mistake. these were so darn tiny ... i made a mistake. these were so darn tiny. i threw them out. my product measures out in mg, and it takes forever to use this tiny measurement. threw it out! Review 18: rating 5.0. Excellent buy for the price. These are sturdy, long handled scoops for measuring minute quantities of material. The scoop interior is about the size of a small glass head pin. the scoop itself is a little delicate, but not ridiculously so. Fortunately, you have 100 tries if you break one. If you want to scoop into pills this could work for small ones, or if you like to pack your pills carefully.Or if you want to add small quantities to the filler. The scoop handle is about six and a ... Review 19: rating 4.0. Four Stars These are blue sticks. They are a little flimsy. The scoop sometimes sticks more than I wish it would.

reference_output: rating 3.0. Too tiny I wanted to use these to transfer a small amount of liquid. Unfortunately, these are so tiny that while I can scoop up the liquid in them, the surface tension just holds it in place in the scoop and it is impossible to pour it back out.

Review 1: rating 5.0. Must have for people with hard water Best stuff ever to keep your DW running clean. reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Beautiful print quality. I used the phrozen abs like matte grey. Had an issue initially cause the build plate wasn't z calibrated low enough at first. Actually I didn't even use a paper. Just loosened the screws, lowered the build plate myself, then calibrated and tightened the screws again. Just putting this out there in case anyone has a similar issue of their test print not sticking to the build plate. Other than that, it's not very noisy and prints in high quality. Review 2: rating 2.0. Too many layer lines due to mechanical issues I wanted to start the review by saying, I have 8 years experience printing in FDM, and 1 year in resin. I own 5 printers (4 Elegoo and 1 Creality). This Phrozen is a very well designed and manufactured printer but issues with layer lines due to mechanical problems (possibly caused by packaging or assembly).

I spent 2 days troubleshooting the first Mini 4k printer I got. Even spoke with tech support and printed all the files wit... Review 3: rating 5.0. I liked it so much that I opted to pick up their mid sized Mighty printer as well. Review 4: rating 5.0. Pretty Fast My first resin printer, so I felt like it would be daunting. After setup and getting used to the post-curing process, this thing spits out nice looking prints(I mostly just print at 0.05mm or 50um).

I was more worried I wouldn't level the bed very well especially with how it kept feeling like it wasn't leveled enough to keep the test paper snug. Turns out this one is notorious for being a little difficult to initially level your bed. I definitely recommend pati... Review 5: rating 1.0. Phrozen was great here and shipped me out another unit within days.
The new unit seemed to be great. Printed out several test prints to fine tune the Aqua 4k grey resin and was able to get one good print.
Now, I have had 3 successive failures in a row, where almost all th... Review 6: rating 1.0. I play Flames of War (15mm miniatures). A single house is $20 +s/h. With this I been making an entire city, farm, windmill, walls etc. And it isn't $20 a building.

I had a quick no hassle reply with them saying they are shipping me a new screen that same day.

With the new screen put in, it works amazing. It blows my photon out of the water and even shames my friends X1. The level of ... Review 11: rating 4.0. Getting parts can be pricey I have a few printers, fdm, and now this dlp. Using the 4k resin by phrozen, I've managed to print at .025 resolution, I print pretty slow but, they models come out amazing. The detail I can get on something a third of the size of a glue stick is shocking.

The not so great. They give you sandpaper-dont use it.
It's for scuffing the build plate. Buy a tile from as hardware store, 12x12, stock up on some 220 grit full sheet. Rubbing alcohol a... Review 12: rating 3.0. 1) The build plate arm will flex on layer changes (both on pull-up and push-down). This leads to layer shifts along the Z axis, ie. banding. I designed and built a diagonal strut to reinforce the build plate arm, and now that force is being transferred to the Z axis gantry, which is ... Review 13: rating 5.0. I used roughly the same settings as recommended in the Phrozen Sonic Mini 4k fb community Google Docs spreadsheet.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Highly recommended This cement has a great "peanut butter-like" consistency which makes it very easy to work with. It sets up relatively hard in about an hour; I used it to cement some fire bricks in my backyard fire pit and it worked great. Definitely easier than mixing up your own! Review 2: rating 3.0. Not as advertised Deceptive. This item is NOT the item displayed in the image. The picture clearly shows a "1 Gallon" product, but the actual item you'll receive is 1/2 Gallon. The 1 Gallon version of this product is titled "MEECO'S RED DEVIL 611 Refractory Cement" and is understandably more expensive. Don't get duped by the deceiving picture or the fact that the written description states weight rather then volume. Review 3: rating 5.0. Goes on easy and dries hard. This is a very smooth mix that spreads like butter and sticks very well. It covers a large area for the volume. I would like to give my fire box a second coat, but one tub covered almost everything in sight. Review 4: rating 5.0. Used this to re brick my Rumsford fire place We used this cement to rebrick our fireplace interior. We set firebrick and used this as the mortar. It set up wonderfully and was as hard as the firebrick after our first hot fire. It's been a few weeks since the job and it looks terrific. Easy to work with, will recommend it and use it again! Review 5: rating 5.0. Works very well. I bought this refractory cement to use for constructing a home made gas fired smelting oven.

The cement is a dark gray color and has the consistency of warm peanut butter. It spreads nicely onto fire bricks and is easy to work with. When it dries, it has the same gray color, but slightly lighter.

The cement air dries in 1/2 hour or so, good enough to handle something that was cemented together, but to really CURE the cement needs to be heated.I used this to fix a fire box inside my Big Green Egg. It worked perfectly for sure.
I was very easy to use and made a very strong bond. Review 20: rating 4.0. While it is too soon to tell of its lasting ... While it is too soon to tell of its lasting power, the first month of use of this product has been flawless. And by flawless, I mean nothing has blown up, nor burned down. Huzzah!
persona: This customer prioritizes durability, performance, and value, seeking reliable, high-quality tools that deliver consistent results at a competitive price, and is likely to repurchase based on proven functionality and fit.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Five Stars Great stuff...used on the glass mat in my forge

The inside brush always breaks off even if I'm spinning with spiral running the drill below 1000 RPM. You might get it to last longer if you can avoid having the drill clutch kick in.

Eventually the entire brush assembly will break off the shaft, a pipe clamp fixes this. Review 6: rating 4.0. Works great, saves a ton of time! This thing works great. Saves a ton of time. I'm betting the people who broke theirs were accidentally cleaning the inside of the pip... Review 7: rating 1.0. I HATE IT DO NOT BUY!!! Absolute garbage of a product. reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. Don't buy Couldn't even change from C to F scale. The instructions are un-discernable. Review 2: rating 5.0. Great pH meter for the Home Brewer. I use this meter for homebrewing applications. I was very impressed with the storage case, supplied three point testing solutions (two sets), and batteries. It is easy to use, has a temperature readout, and ATC. Excellent tool for the homebrewer looking to dial in mash pH. Review 3: rating 1.0. Cannot calibrate for the second time Used it for a month. Not sure how accurate it is but I trusted it. I stored it in a ph meter storage solution and didn't let the probe dry out.
When I tried to calibrate it the second time with the powder that came with it it wrote end after SA (calibration for 6.86), which means that there is something wrong with it. Should've believed all the other reviews. Review 4: rating 1.0. sour ph meter I could not get this product to work out of the box. It consistently said the the ph of the test samples was too high to read. Since I have an advanced science degree and am a MD, we cannot plead lack of technological skills. It just plain didn't work. We will see how the company responds.
also, it would be good if an English speaker proofed the instructions. Review 5: rating 2.0. Calibrated this and it worked awesome. Stored in Storage solution religiously Bought this on July 3rd, Calibrated this and it worked awesome. Stored in Storage solution religiously... today August 3rd I go to calibrate and its giving me false readings and it reads end during the calibration process.. Broke in 1 month exactly... I do not recommend this product..

Update: I guess they saw my review and sent me a new meter. Very pleased. I will update my review accordingly. Review 6: rating 2.0. Wrong reviews for ph meter Only had this ph meter for 2 weeks seems ok.
My problem here is most of the reviews aren t even for the ph meter, I think that's deceiving. Review 7: rating 1.0. One Star Junk... does not last; probe has short lifespan. Review 8: rating 1.0. My review comment was read by Ms. Amy, this lady felt my pain and went immediately into action. Long story short, I now have a replacement meter, working fine. Customer service is second to none!!! Review 10: rating 5.0. You also have to treat it like a scientific instrument because it is a scientific instrument I've been using this for over a year reliably. Replaced the batteries one time. Dropped it in the water many times and it keeps working. I saved the calibration fluid in mason jars and have been re-using them for over a year. p.s. I change my review with one star to four stars, because I was contacted by the customer support and offered another meter.

I read that Kroil works where others fail so I gave it a try. I was able to remove all three of the badly rusted caps with a little Kroil and some taps from a small mallet on a pipe wrench. Review 1: rating 1.0. One Star Did not work as hole wasn't sealed at all Review 2: rating 5.0. Like duct tape, but better. This is some seriously strong tape. reference_output: rating 5.0. Small, powerful, portable, great attachments and pretty darn cute. I previously owned a 10 gallon shop vac and its uses was limited to the shop and occasionally I would lug it out of the basement to vacuum the cars.  It was horribly loud, big and clunky. This little guy is quite powerful can easily be carried about and has already been used more than I had planned.  Still loud, but well within tolerable levels.  It is light, small, maneuverable, and the attachments are great !  I have dust on the floor molding in my house that my expensive Dyson COULD handle if it didn't come with a shockingly poor tool.  Dyson Frankenstein-merged a cup brush attachment and an angled nozzle tool so the brush is unusable.  So much for Dyson design.  : /  This Shop vac has a great cup brush attachment and all of the suction power and portability for this job.  I rated this five stars because 6 stars is not an option.

We have two AC units and I replaced the cap in the first one two years ago and the other this year. I keep an extra one on hand now just in case. The tell tale signs of a bad start/run capcitor is that the fan and compressor try to start and immediately stop. If this is the case, take a look at the old capacitor for bulges in the top or oil leaking out. If you see anything like this you probably hav... Review 9: rating 5.0. Perfect fit, perfect price! The newer capacitors (now branded as Genteq) seem to be thinner (2.125") so if I went with them, I would have had to adjust the bracket. Review 10: rating 5.0. change it on summer 2015 and it is still running great.. This little capacitor save me around $200 dollars. If you are a do it your self type of person and have some knowledge about electricity, you could replace the capacitor on your compressor unit of your AC.
It is so good price that I recommend you to have an extra for future replacement needs.

Review 1: rating 5.0. Excellent PETG filament. This PETG is strong, layers bond great and is solid black. Printed great on my ROBO 3D printer. Size is consistent and as usual the ESUN spool is always a nice touch. I'll be switching out from PLA to PETG from now on. I have attached a close up photo to show the detail and layer bonding. Review 2: rating 5.0. Great Stuff Another great PET product from eSUN. I previously ordered the blue, which was a great first time experience. This solid black PETG looks amazing, looks like PLA (not see through at all,) prints in a very nice glossy jet black finish, and is very good quality filament. The spool I had was all within +/- 5mm and had an average diameter of 1.70. Review 3: rating 3.0. Too black I love the natural, yellow is terribly ugly and black is too black and too shiny. This PETG filament just rocks! guess not all petg filaments are made the same. Review 6: rating 5.0. PETG is a great material! PETG is a great material!

It took me a while to get things really looking good with it but once I figure out a few things.. everything else fell into place.
I'm using a Robo3D R1+ with a E3Dv6 hotend.

* Yes it DOES print better with a heated bed and it IS SO much better than ABS in my opinion. I like 70c for bed
* YES the warping is MUCH lower than ABS and even PLA (in my view)
* Yes it does string a bit more until you ge... Review 7: rating 4.0. Love PETG I use an E3D V6 hotend and no heated bed. I have Buildtak on the glass, with a 50-50 mix of white glue and water. The latter actually is more for a release agent. There is a two layer raft, the first layer goes down at 245 C and all layers after that 240.

Depending on what is being printed (smaller stuff need cooling larger do not) sometimes I have a fan that creates a breeze across the bed. Layer adhesion is great, but you will need to tweek the retract and feed... Review 8: rating 5.0. Another winner from eSun, highly recommended Another winner from eSun. I really liked the eSun PLA Pro and got great prints from it on my Wanhao i3. I tried Taulman TechG and it was OK but I couldnt get it dialed in. So, I tried the eSun PETG and it is fantastic, just like its PLA+ brother. WOW, very nice glossy black prints and very strong. I print the PLA+ at 215/60 45mm/sec and I print this PETG at 250C/70 45mm/sec. I'm not seeing a stringing problem or anything unusual (exc... Review 9: rating 5.0. Favorite filament to date! This stuff has really blown me away. I've been printing more and more parts for my quadcopters and have been struggling with pieces shattering on hard impacts, but apparently those days are gone!

I print with a 240c hot end and 80c glass bed and this stuff prints just as easy as PLA, has a great look to it, and is incredibly strong! I honestly don't see myself using anything else for the majority of my prints.

If you've been printing P... Review 10: rating 1.0. One Star Started bubbling and popping out of the box. not recommended Review 11: rating 3.0. and great prints. Because eSun has different colors, I wanted to try them out. Unfortunately, but I was getting frequent jams in my E3D V6 extruder. The thickness variability is all over the map and was having difficulty in dialing in the settings as well as the preload on the feed on my Printrbot Simple Metal. I purchased clear PETG from another supplier on Amazon and low and behold, the filament thickness was fairly consistent, no jams, and great prints. Review 12: rating 5.0. This opaque black PETG seems to print better than the semi-transparent colors also offered by eSUN This opaque black PETG seems to print better than the semi-transparent colors also offered by eSUN. Once you get your settings dialed, it prints as good as PLA, with much more strength and flexibility. No smell whatsoever when printing and very little warping except on very large flat pieces. About the only con is that support material is sometimes difficult to remove. This is defini... Review 13: rating 5.0. I really like this filament I really like this filament, it's never given me any real issues. It arrived quickly in a vacuum sealed bag with a desiccant. I printed this filament on a prusa i3 WITHOUT a full metal extruder from 255-257c with few issues. This is a stringy filament but the strings can be removed with a few passes over the flame of a lighter so I preferred using that method instead of trying to dial in the retraction properly. Please be aware if you run this filament on ... Review 14: rating 1.0. PLEASE DON'T BUY!!!!!!!!!!!! I tried everything that is listed from esun on the FAQ page. I have tried 4 to 5 rolls of this stuff and it is the worst thing I have ever bought in my life. I wanted it to work so bad hence the 5 rolls. I have been trying for 8 months to get this to work. YES I have tried everything not only from esun but from all ends of the internet to get a successful print with nothing that worked. I know how to print and have been printing for a couple of years no... Review 15: rating 5.0. My favorite filament This has become my favorite filament for printing. I have a Flashforge Creator Pro which I use daily to print various parts for photography and engineering projects. I used ABS filaments mostly before finding this eSUN PETG.

The problem I found with ABS is that it tends to be somewhat brittle and I had a few parts that had problems with the layers separating under stress. There is also a problem with warpage on larger parts.

When I changed t... Review 16: rating 5.0. Great filament! As strong as ABS with much less warping and much better layer adhesion. Review 17: rating 5.0. Simple Printing of High Strength Parts This stuff is great. I printed a few PLA prints and the stuff was a pain to clean off. PLA was very sticky and once it got into my hot end, was impossible to clear. This stuff prints pretty easily and has great layer adhesion. The parts feel extremely strong and I am able to get pretty fine details. It also is able to bridge with the fan turned up during bridging.

I will say that the temperature range I have found is pretty picky... Review 18: rating 2.0. eSUN PETG filament is just like any other PETG eSUN PETG filament is just like any other PETG, once you configure your printer to handle the special needs, it works fine. All PETG are very viscous and requires more cleaning and more refined setting on infill and first layer. I print on glass, at 95ºc, Hotend first layer 255ºc and 236ºc for the others, this way I don't need any dressings or treatments on my glass. First layer width, 175% and hight 175%. Infill Extrusion width at 140%.... Review 19: rating 5.0. Five Stars Very clean and consistent results, no issues with stringiness. Will definitely buy again. Review 20: rating 5.0. Solid performer, love the clear spools. I have had excellent results with this eSUN PETG filament on my Prusa i3 MK2. The strength of this filament Is excellent, tougher than ABS although not as heat resistant. This PETG filament is stringer than PLA or ABS but with the correct retraction settings strings were minimal and otherwise it printed as easily as PLA without the odor of ABS. I received this filament quickly and it was packaged very well, for these reasons I would highly reco...

Hook all up to a water supply and you have your bird drinker…lasts only for about one season, however, since there will still be rust in spite of all the prep work. Review 16: rating 5.0. rating 5.0. Comfortable Masks that Allow You to Breathe Freely! With Covid-19 you can't afford to make one mistake and forget to wear a mask. With how comfortable these masks are they are easy to put on with the flexible earloops. I've not had a mask fall off my face even once. The second package I ordered has even better nose-bridge strips which form to your nose with a slight press on both sides.

I feel very safe wearing these masks as they have a protective layer that blocks out droplets that could be in the air from coughing or sneezing or just people breathing! Really you can't be too careful!

What I appreciate about these masks is that they are affordable and I can throw them away after even one use. They are also not irritating to your face when wearing them for extended shopping trips, etc. I've worn these out and at home and they seem perfect.

~The Rebecca Review

Review 1: rating 5.0. Classic Caliper was delivered quickly. Yea! It is easy to read and use. I like it because it has a classic dial on it (as opposed to new digital ones). I don't really need the fractions on the dial but it is convienent for me when I need a quick and dirty measurement. (its not really that dirty ;) I have to admit that it gets me a little respect to have it at work. ( I am a female engineer and I think the men here think it is cool I have one.) Review 2: rating 5.0. Oshlun MTDCT-06 6 inch stainless steel fractional dail caliper http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B0012YMV50/ref=cm_cr_rev_prod_title
I like the accuracy of this product. It has a variety of functions such as depth gauge, inside measurements, outside measurements. The dial is easy to read, calibrated in 64ths of an inch. I do a lot of wood turning and this caliper makes my work more accurate. It is truly a fine tool. It locks in position making assuring accuracy in use. Review 3: rating 4.0. 3. The sensation of a "hump" that the gear needed to get over as c... Review 6: rating 4.0. Does the job well I am a professional woodworker. My pieces fit together with dry fit precision. I read in the company's description above that accuracy is +/- .001, so when I see it off zero, that tiny bit probably is .001. So mine is as accurate as described. The metal is nothing fancy, but it is smooth and machined w... Review 16: rating 5.0. I love this tool I love this tool! I use the locking function and a pencil or scribe to mark lines. It comes with a case, but it is always out and close by on my bench.
The little retaining bar at end that keeps t... Review 17: rating 1.0. Sent me defective used item I took a chance and bought a used item. Dial totally didn't work. Review 18: rating 1.0. I will find a suitable screw locally, but this is a disappointment, as I am otherwise satisfied with the caliper.

The stuff worked perfectly. I highly recommend it. Review 4: rating 5.0. Expensive, but great glue I've bought a few cans of this and for spray on glue it's very good. Works a bit like contact cement- spray on, leave for a few minuets until it goes tacky and then stick both surfaces together. I originally bought it because I needed to glue some rubber flooring down, but it didn't work fantastically well (mainly because the rubber has a high oil content), but it certainly worked better than any other glue I've tried. On most surfaces it works really well- ... Review 5: rating 5.0. Surprisingly effective so far I've never tried a spray on contact cement - always used the roll-on can of goop. But I saw this used and recommended in a wood working video, so I decided to give it a try. I'm happy with it so far. I haven't used it long enough to talk about longevity of the bond. But I will say the application was super easy, worked well, and gave me a very strong bond.

I was concerned about getting a flat seal between laminate and substrate, particular... Review 6: rating 4.0. I like it This is a good price. It patched a rip in my sheet plastic green house cover and in a fish pond I lined with the thick plastic. By the time I sprayed both the patch and the ripped area and got it thick enough to hold, there was not much left in the can but it did stick and hold and it was permanent in ten minutes. 90-24 is so similar to common contact ce... reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Great way to save your fencepost I have a post and rail fence, and have needed to replace several leaning posts over the last couple of years, especially right after the winter. This can be very expensive when a professional does the repair. Then I found out about this item, the EZ Mender, which allows you to easily reinforce an existing fencepost, even one that has begun to rot below the surface. The two steel frames are hammered into place on either side of the post, and then secur... Review 2: rating 4.0. Good produt but be aware I installed this item and works well. However be aware while the picture shows 2 units the package actually arrives with one. What is confusing is that other offers have pictures with 1 unit. Usually you need 2 for proper installation. I managed to get the job done with one. Review 3: rating 5.0. These E-Z Menders saved me time and money..... Lately in Oklahoma, we've experienced some extremely windy conditions during the month of June. My wood post stockade fence took a beating and soon I had several fence posts rocking back and forth. The fence contractor for my home builder did not set the posts correctly and so my 1 year old fence was hanging by a thread. I took a chance with these things and came away very pleased. I bought 6 as you are supposed to use 2 per post. I... Review 4: rating 5.0. Actually works! As noted by others, you need 2 of these for them to be useful.

My situation was a 6' privacy fence that rotted out at the cement base due to the footing being covered in soil.
When I received the items and looked at the instructions, I was cynical that they'd work since I'd be hammering them into the concrete footing and they start off by going in at a bit of an angle, but the wedge part half way up straightens them up once you get them in deep enough.... Review 5: rating 5.0. Great Product I wasn't sure about these when I ordered them, but they saved me a lot of work. They were easy to install, and look like they will last much longer than the original post did. Review 6: rating 5.0. Does what it says it does. Used 4 of these things to shore up my fence so that I could put off rebuilding it. Really made a good difference. Review 7: rating 5.0. It works! I had a couple of fence posts that need reinforcement. I thought I'd have to take the fence apart, dig up and pull the fence posts, and replace them. Before doing that, I tried a couple of these Simpson FPBM44E E-Z Menders. They worked! Compared to rebuilding, the price is minimal; and they're easy to install. I'd definitely buy these again. Review 8: rating 5.0. Great product I loved the product. I knocked them into the ground to fix a rotting fence post and they worked like a charm. I placed some concrete just in case. Review 9: rating 5.0. Excellent in every way Had a leaning fence post that was causing two sections of my privacy fence to sag. I kept putting the repairs off because of cost, the fence is really still in good condition and I'm not much of a carpenter. Anyway, saw this product through Youtube demos and they came highly recommended in my online research. I can't begin to say how great these EZ fence menders are...they were exactly as described and installation was the easiest part of fixing the fence. ... Review 10: rating 4.0. Worked Very Well They worked as expected and saved me from having to replace post in the near future. Would buy them again ween needed. Review 11: rating 4.0. Fence post mender worked! I had one fencepost that was weaving in a strong wind. I put the mender in on only one side, and that firmed it up. Review 12: rating 5.0. Worked great Worked great to stabilize some wood 4x4 posts that were rotted off. It beats trying to dig out the old cement around the posts. Review 13: rating 5.0. Made me think of "wack a mole"! I'm a 68yr old granny and I whacked this thing into place with a 3# sledge hammer. Took me 3 days because it was hot out, so I whacked a few inches a day....but I did it!.....and that fence post is not going anywhere anytime soon! I love it when a product does what it supposed to! Review 14: rating 4.0. 3000 Blows from Thors Hammer Ok let's talk frankly. Any of the videos they show you doing this with less than 3000 hammer strikes per mender is absolute nonsense. It does work but the problem is this - the tolerances between any existing concrete and your fence post is small enough to make ramming a metal frame into the gap nearly impossible. Be prepared for a long and tiring ordeal. Review 15: rating 1.0. Doesn't fit the post! It's advertised that it fits a 4x4 post yet it is only 3.8 inches wide. Doesn't fit. Review 16: rating 5.0. Strong Support THese supports are very strong & have the necessary spring to support my old arbor for years to come. My arbor is over 20 years old that support many large rooted plants. These added much needed support. You do have to put your back into driving them into the ground. Review 17: rating 3.0. Didn't work for me... but appears to be high quality Wanted to repair a broken 4x4 PT post previously set in concrete. Width of this item is too large to fit in the existing concrete post hole - ground is frozen and did not want to break up the concrete. Used something else and this is on the shelf. This may have use to set a new temporary post or repair a post that is set in ground without concrete. Description says "Allows easy repair of rotted or damaged 4x4 wood posts ins... Review 18: rating 5.0. Great product -- better pricing available I got three of these for the $17 price, and can't find that deal any longer. Now I can only find 1 for $17. (These run for $8 each at Home Depot if they have them in stock. Buy them there). The Tie's do what they say they will do. I added years to my fence. Review 19: rating 4.0. good I got two of these to correct a sloppy fence post. These were larger and more heavy duty than I expected. For most purposes that is probably good but for my use, my post is small and light and installing these was a lot of work due to size and heft... though I except they will stay put. Review 20: rating 5.0. Easier than cement Very helpful for a quick repair, and way easier than digging out the post base to pour new concrete. I would highly recommend at least giving this route a try before going to more extreme measures to fix a post base. Be warned that you will need to hit these with a lot of force, repeatedly, and the hammer point will start to bend out. Alternating between a full sledge and a hand sledge worked best for my situation.
persona: This customer prioritizes cost-effective, reliable solutions for outdoor repairs and maintenance, favoring products that are easy to use, weather-resistant, and deliver strong performance without the need for professional services or expensive replacements.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Worked great for post repair Worked great for post repair.  Much cheaper and much easier than replacing entire post or having fence company do the repair.  Highly recommended.  Worked fine on my Ranch Rail Round posts.

The seal it's holding down has been working perfectly as well.

Only thing I couldn't stick it to was a dusty metal surface, and I didn't expect to anyway: it just picks up the dust. Once clean, that metal surface gave ultimate adhesion. I just bought 2 more rolls. Review 15: rating 5.0. Super Strong Tape! The best tape you can buy for packing. It won't come off your boxes and is super strong! Cant go wrong with this brand.
