I used it the day I got it on approximately 100 grommets. It worked like a charm it went through 4 layers of duct tape and the tarp material. Unmitigated success. Buy it with confidence. Review 10: rating 2.0. Difficult to squeeze handles. Not for anyone with arthritis. Requires a lot of hand strength. Even with two hands I couldn’t do it easily. Review 11: rating 2.0. Might work on very light fabrics or ripstop. Does not work on doubled over canvas. Does not cut evenly, not sturdy enough for canvas. Review 12: rating 4.0. Good, easy grommet tool Tool works well. I installed 120 grommets on some heavy duty Poly tarp pieces. The tool punches the hole and secures the grommet in one action. No problems at all. No adjustments required. I did have a couple installation failures. Not a big deal. The grommets are aluminum and not really heavy duty but for general use, no issues. You get 500 grommet sets. Be careful to make sure you separate the flat disc part of the grommet set as they stick together and ... Review 13: rating 5.0. Great grommet pliers Sets grommets very well, I was punching through denim, and tent material layered together, and it didn't even flinch. Requires a firm hand Review 14: rating 1.0. A disaster It looks great. We tried using it, and the grommet it produced had a break in the circle. I then examined the tool, and the hammer and receiving end are off-set. Meaning that all grommets would have cracks in them and be weak. The tool looks good, but is so poorly made that it is useless. Review 15: rating 3.0. This will NOT punch through nylon webbing or strapping Purchased to put grommets in nylon webbing. It would not punch through. Review 16: rating 5.0. Great purchase Easy to use with one hand which is why I purchased. Review 17: rating 4.0. Great product I upgraded to this from my old hammer and wood method, and I am extremely pleased. I had some worries about how it would work, but did great! I used it to add grommets to 16 mil plastic rolled into 2 layers, and it ate through it like butter! Would buy again! Review 18: rating 5.0. Don't waste your time with the cheep ones I bought one of the cheep grommet tools you need a hammer and a block of wood to use and sent it back. Not only didn't work it was very aggervating. This tool works great. Had to punch thru two layers of canvas with no trouble at all. Save your aggervation and spend a little more to get the one that works great. I highely reccomend this product. Review 19: rating 2.0. Didn't work For me it didn't work. The grommets never made a full seal with the ring leaving a unsecured joint that came apart. You get a lot of grommets but the tool didn't work. Review 20: rating 5.0. Works as advertised right out of the box With this BIZOEPRO Handheld Grommet tool I made a tarp for my dump trailer which has 3 foot sidewalls. I took heavy commercial vinyl from a 12 X24 foot billboard wrap and cut to fit. I doubled this heavy vinyl and have put grommets all around this six foot wide by fourteen footlong trailer. With the doubling of this vinyl it is heavy and tick. The tool Worked perfectly which allows me to cover the trailer from the elements and loss of cargo wh...
persona: This customer prioritizes durable, multi-functional products that deliver reliable performance in practical, real-world applications; they value time-saving tools and long-term utility over initial cost, and are likely to repurchase items that prove effective across diverse household or outdoor projects.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Worth the money! Due to unexpected cold snap in Central Florida we had to scramble to protect our tropical plants. Making "shower curtains" out of visqueen and duct tape to wrap around our potting shed was a priority. Once this done we needed holes to thread wire through in order to hang snugly. This grommet set was just the ticket. Instead of having to hammer each grommet with a punch this hand held grommet punch saved us so much time! We consider this more an investment than an expense. I just used it to repair an older tarp to add a few extra holes near corners. I'll be using it on our shade cloth next Spring for sure. Very handy! I will update this review if necessary.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. For quick adhesion The glue is very strong and adhesion is very quick. Hardly takes more than 20-30 seconds for a strong bond. Glues well to stick items on glass and paper. I have also used on my chipped plastic & wooden photo frames. Can not even tell the difference between the new and the old frames. One should be careful while working with this glue, it is very strong and also make my eyes water. I work with a protective glass and gloves while I work with this awesome instant glue... Review 2: rating 2.0. car mending fixed by trim on my car Review 3: rating 5.0. Best Glue Wonderful product. I have used Gorilla Glue in the past and it never fails. You can use it to fix anything from furniture to a broken piece of Lenox china. It works quick, so you have to work quick with it. I will continue to buy this as long as it is around. Review 4: rating 5.0. And so far it's held up fine, even through the dishwasher I used a tiny amount of this glue to repair a ceramic bowl. That's it. That's all I needed it for. And so far it's held up fine, even through the dishwasher. It's easier to apply than the old crazy product, that used to clog instantly. This works. Review 5: rating 2.0. Two Stars Got less then half a bottle of super glue fluid, was pretty ridiculous. (the bottle it came in.) Review 6: rating 5.0. Worth every penny Better than "super glue". This stuff works like a charm. and you get more than a spittle in a bottle! Review 7: rating 5.0. I used this glue to repair a few ceramic mugs ... I used this glue to repair a few ceramic mugs and decorations that had broken. Following the directions and allowing a drying time over night, they are fixed and as strong as ever. Review 8: rating 2.0. Not sure what it's good for. Does not work on plastic. Very unimpressed. Tried on wood as well. No hold there. Not sure what it's good for. Review 9: rating 1.0. One Star received half bottle of glue..... Review 10: rating 5.0. More of a gel than a liquid I am just like everyone else writing a review, I love it! It works! I recommend it!

A little goes a long way don't over apply for several reasons 1) no needs to waste the glue by applying too much 2) It will set up more quickly and which point you can join the two items you are trying to join. 3) it will dry or cure more quickly if you don't over use the product. 4) you won't get as much on you or on the surface you are working on if you apply s... Review 11: rating 5.0. Five Stars This company makes the best holding glue I have ever used Review 12: rating 5.0. Best super glue ever This super glue is amazing! And I'm saying that about glue. The bottle shape is just much better than the traditional bottle and so the glue never dries up in the bottle and just keeps working. Review 13: rating 5.0. Really works, holds strong! This glue really surprised me! So far I glued back of leather driver seat in my car, as it was ripped and a wood chair. I just simply put glue on, sticked parts together and hold for 10 seconds (following instructions, just in case :) That thing holds strong, so you better be careful not to glue yourself :) Love it! Can recommend to anyone who needs something that holds strong :) Review 14: rating 1.0. What a waste of money This came in 60 percent empty. What a waste of money. Review 15: rating 5.0. Very strong hold Holds extremely well. Has glued everything I have used it on even when krazyglue has failed to the same job. Takes a little longer to dry but pressing the item longer and having it actually stick is absolutely worth it. Review 16: rating 1.0. does not adhere to hard plastics. did not work on a hard plastic surface. Review 17: rating 1.0. One Star The bottle came half empty and the package smelled like glue spilled in it. Review 18: rating 2.0. Didnt fit my need. I heard about Gorilla being really good but i was trying to fix some sea shells i got from a beach to a photo frame. Its just doesn't dry quick enough and had to wait for hours for it to dry up and its bonding power is not as good as it would be. I had to apply multiple times to get the sea shells fixed. One thing it is good at is it sticks to your hands very quickly. Review 19: rating 3.0. SLOW BOND Not an instant bond cyanoacrilic. Takes 30 minutes to dry. If you need time to move parts around and have clamps to hold them in place this might be a good choice. Review 20: rating 1.0. vanishing glue a waste of money. Used it once immediately after I received for a repair and the glue worked well. Went to use the glue about 2 months later, and more than 50% of the glue had "evaporated". The bottle was less than a 1/4 full.
persona: This customer prioritizes reliability, durability, and consistent performance in industrial-grade products, consistently choosing tools and materials that withstand rigorous, daily use without failure, and values dependability over cost, often maintaining long-term loyalty to brands proven in demanding professional environments.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Very strong and durable. We are professional model makers. We use Gorilla Super Glue on an hourly basis. We have yet to see any failure when using this adhesive. Since our jobs depend upon what materials we use, we cannot take risks on shoddy materials. This adhesive is very strong and easy to work with.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 3.0. Worked great for about 2 months attached to my 3d printer Worked great for about 2 months attached to my 3d printer, then stopped. Bad connection inside the switch.

On the plus side, mine showed up with a fuse already installed, and was fairly simple to wire up, even with mediocre soldering skills. Review 2: rating 5.0. Perfect for a hobby cabinet, and comes with fuse. Cost is 2x the shipped-from-China ones that are identical, but this one came with a fuse and is Prime-eligible. Worth every extra penny.

Perfect little switch. Bought some 4.8mm crimp-on terminals, soldered them onto some 16AWG wire, and used some dual-wall heat shrink to protect from possible shock. Used these to make two jumpers from the socket to the switch. Cut the end off my power strip / surge protector and solder... Review 3: rating 1.0. cheap. Quality meets the price. One piece fell ... cheap. Quality meets the price. One piece fell off from the switch. I will ask the seller to replace the item. Review 4: rating 1.0. FIRE RISK! After two weeks of continuous operation the switch contacts burned out and melted the switch casing, almost causing a fire. The switch and fuse states it is rated for 10 Amps but I had it supplying less than 5.

I will not return the switch due to the hassle. I simply bypassed the switch portion to continue using the plug and fuse. Review 5: rating 1.0. Melted The plastic around the terminals melted after 3 weeks while the fuse stayed intact. I was using this to switch a 250 watt heat lamp. This switch was far removed from the heat source in ambient temps of 76-80 degrees.
not very happy and missed my return date by the time I got around to it. Review 6: rating 4.0. Bit of misleading picture... I don't understand why you have create your own jumper wire to go from the power cord connection to the rocker switch... I can't help but wonder why the Mfg didn't do that particular connection themselves... Maybe it's just me, but the frontal view / picture of this product "seems" to be very misleading... You really have to pay attention by looking at the "rear" picture... The fact that the description said "7 prongs" is what rais... Review 7: rating 1.0. Melted after 4 months - Fire Hazard The switch component sparked and melted after about 4 months of regular use. Peak load was only around 3.3 Amps 120V, with the average being closer to 1 amp, so nowhere even close to the supposed rating of the fuse. I really liked the concept of having a plug, fuse, and illuminated switch all in one compact package, but much like some of the other reviews have stated, this unit is a fire hazard. Review 8: rating 1.0. I could easily see how this device could fail more catastrophically as ... Almost immediately burned out the provided fuse when connected to a 5V 12A DC Power Supply with an AC current draw of 2A. I could easily see how this device could fail more catastrophically as others have described. I would highly suggest buying a more reputable product. Review 9: rating 2.0. The first time I bought these they looked just like the photo and worked perfectly The first time I bought these they looked just like the photo and worked perfectly, we cut up a bunch of enclosures to fit these and simply riveted them into place. The second time I purchased them they did not have the side mounting flanges with holes instead they had small side clips that did not hold very well and we could not mount them tightly to our enclosures. The second set also did not come... Review 10: rating 5.0. great item and this one had a fuse with it while others on Amazon were reportedly hit and miss. This came with the fuse which was great. I ordered this same item from another seller 2 weeks prior but was waiting for the China Post ETA of June 6 - June 23rd and decided I didn't want to wait that long to finish my project. I ordered this one as it was a prime item, received it in 2 days and was happy to find it had the fuse, while the other one (arrived early) had no fuse. :)
P... Review 11: rating 4.0. Used in arcade, worked well. Used this for power into an arcade machine.

Worked well. A wiring diagram and cutout diagram would make this nicer.

If you don't care about the switch light, you can run just hot to the switch terminals and neutral directly to power supply. But if you want the switch to light up when ON you will have to wire both hot and neutral to the switch.

I crimped my wires, they went on easy ... but I did notice the ground fell off... Review 12: rating 2.0. A bit on the melty side Bought two of these.. One works okay, the other's internals melted and the switch broke. Review 13: rating 1.0. Do you smell something burning? I've gone through two of these switches-- both have had their top switched terminal melt and charred the plastic and crimp connector I had attached. Both were at under 150W load (1.28A at 117V measured RMS) which is way less than the stated 10A. One melts? Well that could just be a fluke or a poor connection on my part. Two melt in the exact same place? These are accidents waiting to happen. Both of mine lasted a little under a year, but I imagine at t... Review 14: rating 5.0. Good Upgrade for 3D Printers Used this on my chinese Prusa i3 3D printer to give it a longer cord and an on/off switch. You'll just need jumper wires and female blade connectors to wire it up, then some way to protect the back from being exposed when you have it plugged in. Don't let your fingers touch two hot terminals while it's plugged in though, ask me how I know. Review 15: rating 3.0. The plastic melted way to easily even under low heat solder The fuse connection setup leaves much to be desired. Does not stay in place very well and the cover did not fit over the fuse. Ended up not using the fuse because of this. The plastic melted way to easily even under low heat solder. Review 16: rating 5.0. Works great, but no wiring diagram. I finally got around to mounting this onto my 3D printer, and it works great so far. Luckily, I was able to find a wiring diagram somewhere else online, because the seller didn't provide one and it was surprisingly difficult to find. It's awesome to be able to just flip a switch to turn my printer on or off instead of having to unplug it each time. Some of the other reviews have been saying that the fuse inside blows easily, but I haven't experienc... Review 17: rating 4.0. Four Stars Works as intended. Just wish the package included wiring instructions. I looked the schematic up online. Review 18: rating 5.0. Very clean finish Wanted a clean look on the back of my arcade machine. Cut the plug off a power strip. Hooked it to the inside of this plug. Check other reviews or search online to see exactly how to wire it. Review 19: rating 5.0. Standard IEC inlet This seems to be a fairly standard part and everything went together well. I use it as the mains switch/fuse for 30A 12V power supplies and it works well. My only note is to remember to be safe and use sheathed crimp terminals or heat shrink on the contacts and I used a piece of electrical tape to cover the bus connector on the L side where it goes from the plug to the fuse. Review 20: rating 5.0. Excellent Switched Power Pass Through Excellent power switches for replacement or your custom build. I use these for a pass through and switch on video arcade machines. Perfect for anything that needs a pass through with switch and accepts a standard PC power cord.
persona: This customer values functional design and versatility in products, particularly those with multiple use options and quick-drying performance, and is willing to overlook minor build quality issues if the product delivers reliable results across various applications.
reference_output: rating 3.0. Decent Design, Brittle Plastic The design and construction is OK. But the plastic is too brittle. The power switch is designed to be popped into place. When pushed into place part of the plastic frame that is supposed to hold the switch broke off. I had to super glue the switch in place.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Creality has impressed yet again I’ve purchased a number of printers from amazon, and the Creality line never disappoints. My main printer is an Ender 3 Pro, and when they announced the V2, I figured it was worth trying out. I have to say that I’m very impressed. The additions they made like the color screen, low profile power supply, Gates belts, and tensioners do certainly make the difference from
The V1.

In my opinion, if you like to tinker and do mods, go for the ... Review 2: rating 5.0. Worth every penny [[VIDEOID:64dae1365c56575b5923c8ebb932e365]] The v2 has several improvements over the original. The silent board is a great improvement. The unit heats up much faster then the original as well. Review 3: rating 3.0. Started great but ended up returning printer The prints were great after leveling the bed and all.
Went to print something and the bed stopped heating up (Thermal Runaway Warning).
I emailed customer service but haven't received a response.
I checked for a loose connection or a burnt wire but found nothing.
I asked reddit and facebook groups with zero luck.
So I just ended up returning it. Review 4: rating 4.0. Love my 3d printer Definitely get what it’s worth I love it already!!! Review 5: rating 5.0. Out of the box Second one of the 3V2. Working great almost right out of the box! Review 6: rating 1.0. Should be called Crapality RANT TIME!!!
I'm just going to put the results first....the details you can read through if you're bored.....in short after weeks of troubleshooting with creality "support" they finally said they'd send me a new main board....i'm like ok that would be great as that's kind of what i was suspecting all along, i then waited and got a response saying i needed to pay for shipping with a invoice for shipping....while it's only $9.66 USD, I still say that's a... Review 7: rating 2.0. Damaged rollers and defective card reader. The rollers on the Y axis were scratched and damaged causing uneven printing. Also, the card reader does not work. Review 8: rating 5.0. Worked as expected after initial set up Had to recheck the leveling as I had not accurately secured the Z-axis limit switch. So consequently I did scratch the build plate. However, after that issue I printed my 3mm high test square and it came out perfect. I then printed a couple of PPE face mask holders, followed by a 3 hour print of an in place gear mechanism. See pictures. Everything came out perfect. Th gear latch mechanism worked right off the plate, This is my third 3D printer... Review 9: rating 5.0. V2 is definitely a WIN I haven’t used tech support so I cannot comment on that. This is not my first 3D printer, everything just works like a dream. Octoprint recognized it and worked without a bunch of BS firmware altering. Just put it together and go. Definitely a pleasant experience after putting a Bigtree Tech board in that requires massive editing for anything to work correctly. Review 10: rating 5.0. Works great [[VIDEOID:ab6c6712f2308ad6e375ff592587d9f7]] Got this 2 weeks a go and have been useing it a lot. I love how well it works and the kind of quality you get for the money. It was easy to setup once you watch a couple YouTube videos. I really don't know how I went so long without one of these. I will buy it again hopeing soon so i can double the fun!!! Review 11: rating 5.0. Great quality prints for a very good price Easy to assemble, with amazing print quality. Review 12: rating 1.0. Defective X-Axis motor driver Very impressed with how quite the stepper motors and fans are. But the X-Axis motor driver on the circuit board was broken right out of the box. I verified the X-Axis driver was bad by taking the Z-Axis cable and plugging it into the X stepper motor.

I also checked the connection the the circuit board, it is fit properly and glued from factory.

Only reason I am giving 1 star. I will order again and update to 5 stars if it works.... Review 13: rating 5.0. Best bang for buck Perfect printer for starting out. Review 14: rating 2.0. Don't believe the hype Lot of issues with this printer. TLDR; Its a cheap printer, will require a lot of tweaking to get it setup right and a lot of learning to understand firmware settings to get the most value out of your spend on this machine.

Issues:
1. Board versions is a lucky draw. The latest version is v4.27. I got a v4.22 board as sold by "Elysia U". 4.27 has newer drivers and will support new features in updated firmware better. Unfortunately, there doesn't ... Review 15: rating 5.0. Great product I am in love with this printer. I have found great support online and have been able to print some great products. If you are looking for a reliable printer this is the one Review 16: rating 5.0. Great product I am in love with this printer. I have found great support online and have been able to print some great products. If you are looking for a reliable printer this is the one Review 17: rating 1.0. Not great design Idk if the springs are supposed to be different sizes but order the upgraded springs, they're recommended anyway and I could not see how you could level the bed with the stock springs. The bed also runs into the motor unless it's raised nearly all the way in the rear side. Makes adjustments difficult when you only have so much room to begin with. Have not been able to start printing bc the stock design has so many seemingly obvious flaws. Hopefully I can get it runni... Review 18: rating 5.0. Great starter printer right out the box. I bought this printer not knowing anything about being able to do 3D prints. When I say I gained so much knowledge from YouTube and just researching the sample filament they send you is the best. I wish it came with more make sure you adjust setting depending on the filament you do buy it plays a major role. 10/10 recommend to any beginners who don’t know a lot or to experts who want a quite printer with minimal fan noise I can run it at night...
persona: This customer values functional, practical products that solve immediate needs, particularly for organization or utility, and is willing to overlook minor flaws if the item delivers on core functionality, but is highly sensitive to poor instructions and unclear product purpose.
reference_output:
rating 1.0. Stuff The Pipe Man, one star. My wife convinced me to purchase a 3D Printer. She is an adventurous woman, and was seeking a bedroom toy that would fill her up to the brim.

I found the “model” on the line. I bought some dark black filament, and went to work putting this together.

The instructions are awful. The book is awful. The printer is awful.

I finally got this wiz bang stupid assembled. Then, I started printing the baby’s arm. The kickstand. The third leg.

Man, this thing is BIG! My wife giggled with excitement as she saw layer after layer of dark plastic being out into a cylindrical shape.

She enjoys a veiny member.

The issues started when the shaft was done, but the family jewels were crooked and stupid looking.

My wife is into ball play, but this is ridiculous.

Secretly i was hoping the machine jammed so she would have to have the white meat.

Anyway, I sent this thing back. It sucks.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 2.0. Would not dare use the unit to its rated design These pulleys are good looking and appear well manufactured, but the specification that gives them a breaking strength of over 3,000 lb is, optimistic.

The pin from which the entire assembly hangs is hardly 1/4", less actually it would give the pins (before any corrosion) only some 1200 lb.

If they are special steel, one might get more.

We bought these to use in an onboard crane, it lifts boats on and of... Review 2: rating 5.0. ... radio antennas in the trees with dacron rope for easy servicing. Holds up to New Hampshire weather Use these to hang amateur radio antennas in the trees with dacron rope for easy servicing. Holds up to New Hampshire weather! Review 3: rating 5.0. Good value for High quality. Have a couple of these. Exposed to the elements year round and they hold up quite well. Good value for money Review 4: rating 5.0. Worth the money for the serious boater Great pulley ! Always used galvanize pulleys for ware I dock my boat , this lasted 10 yrs instead of the metal only lasting 2 Review 5: rating 5.0. Five Stars Sturdy. Exactly what I needed for my homemade lat pull system in my gym. Review 6: rating 4.0. Great pulley, great price! Installed on a dog run with both a full sized Boxer and full sized American Bulldog.

Smooth, quick, quiet, very low drag...

One note: I recommend using Loc-Tite or comparable threadlocker on the only removable screw, as it will inevitably begin to slowly back out. Review 7: rating 5.0. This pulley is amazing, smooth as butter This pulley is amazing, smooth as butter. I have ordered about 10 different pulleys now to use for a pull-down weight lifting setup I made in my basement. Some of the other pulleys were so bad that the pulley wouldn't even spin and the rope would just slide on the pulley. I am using this with 7mm climbing rope. Review 8: rating 5.0. Five Stars This thing is helping me pull down all kinds of leaners in my backyard. Review 9: rating 5.0. Ronstan Blocks as the BEST!!! Use these for Mast Top Halyard Blocks on my 26' Columbia and they work great! Review 10: rating 5.0. Tom W This little snatch block is well built, its stronger than I expected. Review 11: rating 4.0. Four Stars great to put a elk in a foster subaru Review 12: rating 5.0. Five Stars Need to lift heavey items up to the second floor faster then wench that you hand crank.. Review 13: rating 5.0. Great for gym pulley replacement. Excellent quality. I build my own gym racks and such, i had been using the pulleys from home depot and they would last about 3-4 weeks. THis pulley is indesctructable, ive now had it for 6 months and its going strong. I use it for lat pulldowns and cable rows with 200+ pounds and its smooth as silk. It's quiet and feels like it has incredible build quality.

now july 2019 and the same pully is going strong, i came to buy some more. Review 14: rating 4.0. Perfect for cable exercises! These work perfectly to create and viable cable and pulley solution for working out. They are quiet and smooth. The weight capacity far exceeds what I could ever lift.

A word of caution though. When using steel cable, you MUST use the vinyl coated type other wise your $30 pulley will be destroyed FAST! (For reference, I’m using 1/8 diameter cable) Also be aware, these pulleys don’t come apart, so make sure you measure and assemble your cabl... Review 15: rating 5.0. Lovely quality with a very smooth pull It does squeak occasionally, but it pulls very smooth with no resistance at all. Review 16: rating 1.0. Really disappointed. Waste of money. Do not bet your life on this swivel pulley block. It is poor quality. I'd also challenge the claim that it can hold more than 3,000 pounds. If I was torquing on a tree with it I wouldn't have anyone nearby. The swivel seems like the biggest point of failure. The wheel is plastic. The outer metal is super thin.. like heavy sheet metal. Review 17: rating 5.0. Lightweight and extremely smooth action. Theses blocks are solid and light weight. The bearing action is super smooth. I use these as a pulley system for my outdoor cable weightlifting. I had the Home Depot non-ball bearing versions prior to these and those others were heavy, noisy, squeaky, not smooth and got really hot. Don’t waste time. Go for the RONSTANS from the start you will not regret it. Review 18: rating 5.0. Quiet and smooth pulley I was looking for a pulley in my physical therapy office that wasn’t noisy like the pulley I had before. This one is smooth and quiet. Love it. Review 19: rating 5.0. Very smooth operation I used it to pull up shade sails over a section of my backyard. It works like a charm.

Review 1: rating 5.0. Feels like modeling clay, but with powerful results I've used this on only one item -- to repair a small leak in a hard-shell kayak. It worked for me, also worked for a kayak-owning friend who used it for the same purpose. Used the directions to roll this out like modeling clay, and then applied it on both the inside and outside of the boat where the leak occurred. Last time I checked, the Sugru Web site didn't include kayak repair in the intended uses, but it works there, too. Seems... Review 2: rating 5.0. Makes an awesome stamp! This stuff is awesome! And I could totally see it being addictive. Bought it to make my own wax seal stamp for some packaging since having a custom one made in metal was soooo pricey. Just rolled it in a ball and squished it on a bottle end and carved my design in with a clay carving tool I had around the studio. Now I'm wondering what else I could do with this! Review 3: rating 5.0. Absolutely incredible product that saved me like $70 to get a new charger My Macbook Pro charger wire was starting to break so I got some Sugru to mend the damage. Absolutely incredible product that saved me like $70 to get a new charger. The only downside is each package is not resealable. Luckily I also had an iPhone cable and Apple earphones to reinforce. So basically, Apple, get your s*** together and pack some Sugru with your products. Review 4: rating 5.0. Sugru is always great, though I hope they're improving it even more Sugru is always great, though I hope they're improving it even more. :) White is definitely the best choice, because the other colors can bleed a little. I use a sealing wax glue gun to fill my stamp, and then applied it to paper -- and everyone raved. I may buy more and then sell the wax stamp (it looks similar to the Phantom... Review 7: rating 5.0. If you've never used it, it takes a little time and patience, but it is great for my ceramics. If a lid is too loose, I roll out a coil of it and slowly press it to my pottery and thin it out as I go. Eventually, it spreads and I get a snug fit. It's permanent and washable. Review 9: rating 5.0. Incredibly Useful! I have started using Sugru Moldable Glue for all sorts of projects. Review 1: rating 5.0. Great black filament So I got excited when i read Carbon fiber. While there may be a carbon aspect, do not expect this to be carbon fiber. Its more of a matte black when printing. But the print itself came out good. Printed at 100 speed with 200 deg and the first print came out perfect, no snags or bubbles. Review 2: rating 5.0. Smooth and consistent PERFECT consistency of filament size. No problems with any spoil tangling, and great print.
Fine tuning the feed rate and temperature after a couple of test prints made for a smooth and consistent print. Review 3: rating 1.0. Not carbon fiber!!! Was advertised hard as carbon fiber.... also suggested was hardened nozzles. For the price, I assumed it was carbon fiber impregnated pla as I have read about. It is in fact expensive pla. That is carbon fiber colored (dull black) Review 4: rating 1.0. have not used it yet but... something smells fishy.... It's probably prints good like people are saying because it just pla filiment. easiest material to print. Spool I recieved says pla for material and carbon fibr for color. i think it is likely just black pla filiment. read description regarding material, then read below n specs it says material: pla. one of these statements is a lie, gee i wonder with one...?

something smells on this one. I could be wrong and they just... Review 5: rating 5.0. Prints beautifully with a amazing matte/satin finish! This is an amazing product! It prints so smooth with no adhesion or layer issues. Absolutely love the matte/satin finish!

Please take what others say about "color: carbon fiber" being misleading. Anyone who has ordered from China (Aliexpress, etc.) Can tell you the English word "color" is often confused with "type". The description is clear in that it is a PLA base with carbon fibers. Review 6: rating 5.0. Awesome! Hands Down I was surprised by this product as the final prints were flawless. I had good adhesion, no warping or stringing. Parts were definitely stronger than the PLA counterpart. This is my go to filament when I want carbon fiber prints! Review 7: rating 1.0. Terrible filament I fiddled with this for 2 days on my Ender 3 Pro and couldn't get any reliable prints off of this roll after going through probably about 10 meters of wasted filament. I've tried multiple Cura settings and dried my filament at 50C for 4 hours. Ultimately I switched back to the Overture PLA+ roll and instantly got good results. This is not what I expected out of a filament that costs nearly $30. Review 8: rating 3.0. Buy cheap buy twice If I had to rank myself I would put myself as an intermediate in the 3-D printing world. The reason I’m giving this three stars and not lower it’s because with some experience you can make this filament work however, with my personal experience I’ve had a lot of trouble with prints. The filament seems to have some sort of rigid texture which causes it to get stuck in my printer (dremel digilab 3d45) Long story short by this if you’re an experienced printer but if ... Review 9: rating 1.0. Not actually rigid. This product is imperceptibly more rigid than regular PLA if at all. I bought it to make a drone frame and I knew I’d have to make the frame thicker than a typical frame but I might as well have used regular PLA.

On top of that. The filament crushes under the force of my BMG extruders hears all the time which causes failed prints n probably 8 out of 10 attempts.

I now have a reel of this stuff and I can’t imagine what I’ll use it for as it is... Review 10: rating 2.0. Pretty good. Ive used 8 rolls of this over the past month (I print a lot). Review 11: rating 4.0. Excellent quality filament All I have to say is "Wow!" This is some good filament. However my .4mm nozzle didn't like it. But the .5mm nozzle is perfect. I didn't have any build plate adhesion issues. Didn't have much stringing. However my .4mm Vanadium nozzle did not do so well. I kept getting clogging. To be fair it has gone through about 15 other spool... Review 12: rating 4.0. Very fair price. Prints nice but wound a bit tight. Update 08072021

persona: This customer prioritizes print quality and surface finish, favoring filaments that deliver smooth, consistent results even at higher speeds and standard layer heights, and is willing to invest in reliable materials that enhance print performance and aesthetics.
reference_output:
rating 5.0. This Matte Black filament prints Awesome with a very nice finish. I had decided to give this filament a try to print some pieces I wanted matte black and strong and this printed very well especially because I was printing much faster than normal and at a .2 layer height.
I am using an Ender 3 V2 printing at 215 degrees nozzle temp and 60 degrees bed temp.

Compared to some of my other filaments this turned out very nice and smooth. The piece of the left came out very nice smooth with the print set to iron the top layer. The piece of the right came out looking very nice as well. I'm happy with the filament so far. It also seems to be wound very nice and orderly and was packaged and sealed well.
